title: lactuca scariola var. dregeana
intro: Lactuca scariola var. dregeana, also known as Wild Lettuce or Prickly Lettuce, is a variety of the Lactuca scariola plant, a flowering plant in the dandelion family with a prickly stem and leaves. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antispasmodic, and sedative effects. The health benefits of Lactuca scarioca var. dregeana include relief from anxiety and insomnia, as well as pain relief and reduction in inflammation, making it a popular herbal remedy for stress and sleep disorders. Lactuca scariola var. dregeana can be consumed in various herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to promote relaxation and reduce stress.
